name: Fairy Tail Vs One Piece
description: Fairy Tail Vs One Piece is an anime fighting game with 28 anime characters. Each character has its own unique features, so you can choose any experience. Cool skill combo or normal attack. The classic fighting scenes of One Piece and the demon tail are randomly switched, and the special effects and sound effects are combined to let you feel the real blood fighting.
instructions: J or 1 confirmation br Player 1 AD move S defense J attack K jump L sprint U long attack I special attack br Player 2 arrow keys move down arrow key defense 1 attack 2 jump 3 sprint 4 long attack 5 special att
tags: Action, Anime, Arcade, Battle, Fight, Fighting, Shooting
